chunk_text: We maintain a comprehensive risk register that catalogues all identified risks to the AI system, including technical failures, data quality issues, and potential misuse scenarios. The register is reviewed quarterly.
Our risk log is updated whenever a new vulnerability or operational risk is identified. Entries include risk owner, likelihood, impact rating, and agreed mitigation actions.
A formal risk inventory has been established covering all risk categories for this AI system. It is subject to annual review and audit by the Risk Management Committee.
Der Risikokatalog enthält alle identifizierten Risiken des KI-Systems sowie die entsprechenden Minderungsmaßnahmen. Er wird vierteljährlich durch das Risikokomitee geprüft.
This quarterly marketing report summarises campaign performance across all digital channels, including email open rates, click-through rates, and conversion metrics for the period.
note: irrelevant marketing text — no risk register

chunk_text: The technical file for this system includes full system architecture diagrams, data flow mappings, training pipeline specifications, and results from performance validation testing.
We maintain comprehensive technical documentation describing the system architecture, model design decisions, data preprocessing steps, and post-deployment monitoring procedures.
Die technische Dokumentation umfasst alle erforderlichen Informationen gemäß Artikel 11 des EU-KI-Gesetzes, einschließlich Systemarchitektur, Validierungsdaten und Leistungskennzahlen.
Our annual report to shareholders describes the financial performance of the group and sets out the strategic priorities for the coming financial year across all business divisions.
note: annual shareholder report — no technical documentation

chunk_text: All AI-generated decisions pass through a human-in-the-loop review step before being executed. A qualified reviewer must approve or override each recommendation within 24 hours.
Our human oversight procedure requires that a trained operator reviews all high-risk AI outputs before they affect an individual. The operator must document their assessment in the review log.

Eine menschliche Aufsicht ist für alle Entscheidungen mit erheblichen Auswirkungen auf natürliche Personen vorgesehen. Jede automatisierte Empfehlung muss von einem qualifizierten Mitarbeiter bestätigt werden.
The system provides product recommendations to users based on browsing history and purchase patterns. No human review occurs for individual recommendations as they are considered low-risk.
note: recommendation system — no human oversight described

chunk_text: The system maintains a detailed audit log recording the inputs, outputs, confidence scores, and decision rationale for every automated decision. Logs are retained for five years.
All system events are captured in a tamper-proof audit trail that records user actions, system decisions, and data access events with timestamps and user identifiers.

Alle automatisierten Entscheidungen werden in einem Protokoll erfasst, das Eingaben, Ausgaben und Konfidenzwerte für jede Entscheidung dokumentiert. Die Protokollierung entspricht den Anforderungen des EU-KI-Gesetzes.
The user interface design follows our brand guidelines and applies consistent typography, colour palette, and spacing rules across all screens. Accessibility standards are implemented throughout.
note: UI design text — no audit trail

chunk_text: Prior to deployment, we conducted a comprehensive bias audit across all protected demographic groups including age, gender, ethnicity, and disability status. Results and remediation steps are documented.
Our fairness testing programme evaluates the model's decision outputs for differential impact across demographic subgroups. Testing is repeated after any significant model update.
The data protection impact assessment identifies and mitigates privacy risks associated with the processing of personal data in this AI system, as required under GDPR Article 35.
note: DPIA is a rights impact assessment

chunk_text: We have established a risk management system that covers the full lifecycle of the AI system, from design to decommissioning. The framework aligns with ISO 31000 and the EU AI Act Article 9 requirements.
note: direct term: risk management system + framework

chunk_text: Our post-market monitoring plan defines the procedures for collecting, analysing, and acting on data from the AI system during operational use. Monitoring covers accuracy drift and user complaints.
Users who believe an AI-based decision has adversely affected them can submit a formal complaint through our appeals mechanism. All appeals are reviewed by a qualified human within 10 working days.
The data governance framework defines data quality standards, lineage tracking, access controls, and retention policies for all datasets used to train and operate the AI system.
note: synonym: data governance framework + data documentation
